scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @multiwebgame/shared-types && npm run build -w @multiwebgame/game-engines
scripts.build:apps: npm run build -w @multiwebgame/api && npm run build -w @multiwebgame/realtime && npm run build -w @multiwebgame/web
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && concurrently -n api,realtime,web -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev -w @multiwebgame/api" "npm run dev -w @multiwebgame/realtime" "npm run dev -w @multiwebgame/web"
scripts.test: npm run test -w @multiwebgame/game-engines && npm run test -w @multiwebgame/api
